udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys used by the HatiHatid contract.\nInstance storage is used because this MVP represents one family pool per deployed contract.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Contract errors are explicit so frontend/demo teams can map failures to clear UI messages.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: HatiHatidError

function_v0.doc: Returns the USDC-like Stellar asset contract address used by the pool.
function_v0.name: token

function_v0.doc: Returns the parent payout wallet address.
function_v0.name: parent

function_v0.doc:
OFW sibling contributes to the monthly family pool.
The sibling authorizes the call, tokens move from sibling wallet to the contract,
and once the target is met the contract releases the consolidated payout to the parent.
Returns true only when this contribution triggered the final payout.
function_v0.name: contribute

function_v0.doc:
Initializes one family support pool.
token = Stellar asset contract address for USDC-like demo token.
parent = HatiHatid wallet that receives the final family payout.
target = required pooled amount before release, e.g. 160 USDC in the demo.
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Returns the current monthly pool balance held by the contract.
function_v0.name: get_balance

function_v0.doc: Returns true after the monthly family payout has been released.
function_v0.name: is_released

function_v0.doc: Returns true when an Extra Ambag request is currently active.
function_v0.name: extra_active

function_v0.doc: A sibling approves the Extra Ambag request.\nThe MVP rule is 2 approvals before the supplemental pool can accept contributions.
function_v0.name: approve_extra

function_v0.doc: Returns true after the Extra Ambag payout has been released.
function_v0.name: extra_released

function_v0.doc: Returns whether the contract was initialized.
function_v0.name: is_initialized

function_v0.doc: OFW sibling contributes to the approved Extra Ambag request.\nOnce the emergency amount is fully funded, the contract releases it to the parent wallet.\nReturns true only when this contribution triggered the emergency payout.
function_v0.name: contribute_extra

function_v0.doc: Returns how much a specific sibling has contributed to the monthly pool.
function_v0.name: get_contribution

function_v0.doc: Returns the requested Extra Ambag amount.
function_v0.name: get_extra_amount

function_v0.doc: Returns the reason text for the Extra Ambag request, e.g. "Medicine".
function_v0.name: get_extra_reason

function_v0.doc: Returns current funded balance of the Extra Ambag pool.
function_v0.name: get_extra_balance

function_v0.doc: Parent creates an Extra Ambag request for medicine, bills, tuition, etc.\nThis does not modify the original monthly pool; it opens a separate supplemental pool.
function_v0.name: create_extra_request

function_v0.doc: Returns a sibling's total contribution to the Extra Ambag request.
function_v0.name: get_extra_contribution

function_v0.doc: Returns how many siblings approved the Extra Ambag request.
function_v0.name: get_extra_approval_count
